hero.desc: Since 2005, we have been building world-class new living centers. We specialize in water structures, high-rise residential buildings, shopping malls, and public contracting.

homePage.servicesDesc: With our experienced engineering team, we provide services across a broad range of fields.
homePage.service1Desc: We build complex plant structures with our experienced technical personnel.
homePage.service2Desc: Modern living centers in high-rise projects that comply with quality standards.
homePage.service3Desc: We have unique experience in high-skill water infrastructure projects.
homePage.service4Desc: Hospitals, schools, and rehabilitation centers are delivered under FIDIC standards.
homePage.featuredDesc: Some of the visionary projects we have brought to life.

servicesPage.title: Our
servicesPage.desc: With over 20 years of experience and expert engineering staff, we provide reliable solutions in four main areas.

items.aciklama: We build complex power plant structures with our experienced technical teams.
We construct modern living centers in compliance with quality standards for high-rise buildings.
We have unique expertise in water structures requiring advanced engineering capabilities.
Hospitals, schools, and rehabilitation centers are delivered to international standards.

aboutPage.title: Corporate
aboutPage.desc: Since 2005, we have been building the future in Turkey and around the world with visionary projects.
aboutPage.whoText1: Bend Yapi builds safe structures by combining modern architecture with sound engineering principles.
aboutPage.whoText2: With our expertise in dams, hydropower plants, and large-scale projects, we deliver challenging works on time.
aboutPage.missionText: To build safe, high-tech structures that respect nature.
aboutPage.visionText: To be an innovative brand that successfully represents our country in the global construction sector.
aboutPage.whyCard1Desc: We achieve strong results in challenging projects with our experienced engineering team.
aboutPage.whyCard2Desc: We deliver quality results with process management aligned with FIDIC norms.
aboutPage.whyCard3Desc: We prioritize honesty, transparency, and quality in every project.
aboutPage.ctaDesc: Contact us for professional solutions regarding your projects or partnerships.
